prediction.reasoning: XOM prediction based on historical volatility (~25% annualized), energy sector fundamentals, and 20-day time horizon. Oil prices remain supportive with ongoing geopolitical tensions and supply constraints. Energy stocks typically show moderate positive drift with high volatility. Confidence intervals reflect approximately 2-3% daily volatility with slight upward bias due to dividend yield and current market conditions.
